productDisplayName: Nike Men Printed International White T-shirt
description: Style Note A unique, individual tee from nike's Track and Field collection - with a cool distressed, washed look. The print on the front has been printed on the reverse of the fabric, giving you a washed out, retro look - this T-shirt will look great with your worn-in denims and a cool pair of vans. Product Details White T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves and slightly distressed graphic print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton certified organic - grown without use of synthetic pesticides or fertilizers Machine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on decorations
